name: MasterKodi AI Subs
changelog: Better Hebrew gender: the character/gender map is now remembered per series+season (consistent across episodes, faster), translation chunks are larger with more cross-chunk context (fewer boundary gender errors), and SDH subtitles (with speaker tags) are preferred as the translation source. NEW subtitle window design: two-line rows with the FULL release name always visible (no scrolling), modern dark panel. Don't like it? Settings > 'חלון קלאסי' brings the old one back.
